title: End Planet
description: Add a beautiful blue planet in the sky of the end
body:
A custom End sky resourcepack. This resource pack replaces Minecraft's default End sky with a procedurally rendered, Earth-like planet hanging over the horizon — complete with a glowing blue atmosphere, drifting cloud systems, a day/night terminator, and a hand-tuned star field on a clean black sky.

Everything is generated in real time inside a single core shader (`position_tex_color`), so there are no textures to load and the effect stays crisp at any zoom or FOV.
